tracks.meaning: a small hard object produced by a plant, containing an embryo that can grow into a new plant
to plant seeds in soil for the purpose of growing crops or plants
to give a competitor a designated ranking or position in a tournament bracket based on their skill level
money or resources placed at the beginning of a poker game or betting round
a mature plant ovule containing an embryo capable of germination and growth
an initial value provided to a random number generator to produce a sequence of pseudo-random numbers
to establish or start something as a foundation for future development
initial capital or funding provided to start a new business or venture
the initial file or set of data used to begin a peer-to-peer file download or torrent
small edible seeds from plants used as ingredients or condiments in cooking
the source or origin of evidence in a legal case or investigation
a radioactive implant placed within body tissue for therapeutic radiation treatment
